name: oiap-pvm-verifier
description: Cross-VM Groth16 verifier using Solidity + Rust (PVM).

scripts.build:pvm-zk-verifier: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/.config/.foundry/bin:$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH"; cd contracts/pvm_zk_verifier && cargo +nightly build --target $(polkatool get-target-json-path) --release -Z build-std=core,alloc -Z json-target-spec'
scripts.deploy:pvm-binary: PVM_BINARY=pvm_zk_verifier.polkavm npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-pvm-binary.cjs --network polkadotHubTestnet
scripts.check:all: npm run test:evm && npm run lint:frontend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:prover-cli && npm run build:pvm-verifier && npm run build:pvm-zk-verifier
